word: G3768 - οὔπω - oúpō - oo'-po - Hitherto not

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὔπω

- Transliteration: Oupo

- Phonetic: oo'-po

- Definition:

1. not yet

- Origin: from G3756 and G4452

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G3756 and G4452; not yet: - hitherto not (no...) as yet not yet.
